a.xlink:title: Unified query API for property questions on arbitrary SymbolicExpr trees.
Scoped assumption context with push/pop management.
Stores and validates mathematical properties for named symbols.
Stores relational constraints and derives sign properties for simple patterns.
A stored relational constraint between two symbolic expressions.
符号表达式主类，封装 AST 根节点并提供运算、化简、求解等接口。
符号表达式 AST 节点基类。
